title: Skills
subtitle: Reusable SOPs and procedures for your agents
emptyState: No skills yet. Create your first skill to get started.
emptyDescription: Create your first skill to get started.
deleteDialogDescription: This skill will be permanently deleted. This action cannot be undone.
publishDialogDescription: Once published, this skill will be available to organization members.
publishNoOrgs: No organizations found. Join or create one in Settings.
unpublishDialogDescription: This skill will be set back to personal and no longer available to organization members.
fieldDescriptionHint: Brief description shown as stub in system prompt (~10 tokens)
fieldDescriptionPlaceholder: Process customer refund requests per SOP v2.3
fieldContentHint: Full SOP content -- loaded on demand when agent calls read_skill()
fieldContentPlaceholder:
## Refund Process

1. Verify order ID...
2. Check refund eligibility...
fieldScriptHint: Optional executable script returned alongside content
scriptComingSoonDescription: Attach executable Python or Shell scripts to skills. When launched, the agent can invoke the script automatically alongside returning skill content.
settingActiveHint: Inactive skills are hidden from agents and cannot be called.
settingUsageHint: The agent sees a compact stub in its system prompt. Full content is loaded on demand when it calls read_skill().
settingReadSkillCallHint: The agent uses this exact call to load full skill content during a conversation.
publishStatusReverted: Content changed — publish status reverted to pending review
resourceRefsHint: Resources added here are exposed to the agent as a mapping table when this skill is loaded. Use @alias in the content to direct the agent precisely. Resources bound to the agent but not listed here may still be invoked if the agent deems them relevant.
resourcePickerDescription: Select a resource to reference in this skill.
resourceAliasHint: Short alias used in content via @mention (e.g. @crm)
noResourcesAvailable: No resources of this type available.
mentionHint: Type @ to mention a resource (use arrow keys + Enter to select)
aliasStillInContent: {alias} is still referenced in the content above — you may want to update it manually.
unsavedChangesDescription: You have unsaved changes. Leaving this page will discard them.
templateGalleryDescription: Choose a pre-built skill template to get started quickly
templateCreateFailed: Failed to create skill from template
